title: Document view component with editable toggle and milkdown editor
purpose: Renders a document with an editable toggle button and a markdown editor, switching between review and edit modes.
module_context: Exports a React component DocumentView that manages document editing state and renders a MilkdownEditor with appropriate props based on the document's content and editability.

steps.content: Extract document editable state and toggle function from the UI store.
Create a ref for the milkdown editor and a flush ref for pending edits.
Define a change handler that notifies parent of content changes.
Define a persist handler that notifies parent of content persistence.
Set up an effect to flush pending edits when switching to review mode.
Render a toggle button to switch between edit and review modes.
Render a loading message if document content is not available.
Render the milkdown editor with appropriate props when content is available.
Notify the parent component of content changes.
Notify the parent component of content persistence.
